register_channel.description: register a promotion channel A as a registered channel
preconditions: I can only register a promotion channel A as a registered channel if it is not the case that A is a registered channel and it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I register a promotion channel A as a registered channel, it is the case that A is a registered channel

assign_service_to_channel.description: assign a promotion channel A to a service instance B
preconditions: I can only assign a promotion channel A to a service instance B if it is the case that A is a registered channel and B is available and the promotion channel A can target the service instance B
I can only assign a promotion channel A to a service instance B if it is not the case that A has allocations
effects: Once I assign a promotion channel A to a service instance B, it is the case that A is assigned to the service instance B and A has allocations
Once I assign a promotion channel A to a service instance B, it is not the case anymore that B is available

unassign_service_from_channel.description: unassign a promotion channel A from a service instance B
preconditions: I can only unassign a promotion channel A from a service instance B if it is the case that A is assigned to the service instance B
I can only unassign a promotion channel A from a service instance B if it is not the case that A has a committed deployment and it is not the case that A is ready for rollback
effects: Once I unassign a promotion channel A from a service instance B, it is the case that B is available

Once I unassign a promotion channel A from a service instance B, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to the service instance B and it is not the case anymore that A has allocations and it is not the case anymore that A is prepared and it is not the case anymore that A is staged for migration and it is not the case anymore that A is pending verification and it is not the case anymore that A has been approved for finalization and it is not the case anymore that A has pending environment checks

bind_promotion_config.description: bind a promotion configuration B to a promotion channel A
preconditions: I can only bind a promotion configuration B to a promotion channel A if it is the case that A is a registered channel and the promotion configuration B is available
effects: Once I bind a promotion configuration B to a promotion channel A, it is the case that A has the configuration B
Once I bind a promotion configuration B to a promotion channel A, it is not the case anymore that the promotion configuration B is available

unbind_promotion_config.description: unbind a promotion configuration B from a promotion channel A
preconditions: I can only unbind a promotion configuration B from a promotion channel A if it is the case that A has the configuration B
effects: Once I unbind a promotion configuration B from a promotion channel A, it is the case that the promotion configuration B is available
Once I unbind a promotion configuration B from a promotion channel A, it is not the case anymore that A has the configuration B

activate_promotion_configuration.description: activate a promotion configuration B on a promotion channel A
preconditions: I can only activate a promotion configuration B on a promotion channel A if it is the case that A is a registered channel and A has allocations and A has the configuration B
I can only activate a promotion configuration B on a promotion channel A if it is not the case that A is prepared
effects: Once I activate a promotion configuration B on a promotion channel A, it is the case that A is prepared

attach_verification_agent.description: attach a verification agent B to a promotion channel A
preconditions: I can only attach a verification agent B to a promotion channel A if it is the case that A is a registered channel and A has allocations and the verification agent B is available
I can only attach a verification agent B to a promotion channel A if it is not the case that A is prepared
effects: Once I attach a verification agent B to a promotion channel A, it is the case that A is prepared and A is pending verification
Once I attach a verification agent B to a promotion channel A, it is not the case anymore that the verification agent B is available

operator_stage_migration.description: stage migration for a promotion channel A using a promotion configuration B with an operator credential C
preconditions: I can only stage migration for a promotion channel A using a promotion configuration B with an operator credential C if it is the case that A is prepared and A has allocations and A has the configuration B and the operator credential C is available
I can only stage migration for a promotion channel A using a promotion configuration B with an operator credential C if it is not the case that A is staged for migration
effects: Once I stage migration for a promotion channel A using a promotion configuration B with an operator credential C, it is the case that A is staged for migration
Once I stage migration for a promotion channel A using a promotion configuration B with an operator credential C, it is not the case anymore that A is pending verification

stage_migration_for_version.description: stage migration for a promotion channel A with a schema version B
preconditions: I can only stage migration for a promotion channel A with a schema version B if it is the case that A has allocations and A is staged for schema version B
I can only stage migration for a promotion channel A with a schema version B if it is not the case that A is staged for migration
effects: Once I stage migration for a promotion channel A with a schema version B, it is the case that A is staged for migration
Once I stage migration for a promotion channel A with a schema version B, it is not the case anymore that A is pending verification

assign_precheck_tool_to_channel.description: assign a pre migration check tool B to a promotion channel A for pre migration check
preconditions: I can only assign a pre migration check tool B to a promotion channel A for pre migration check if it is the case that A is a registered channel and the precheck tool B is available and the promotion channel A supports the precheck tool B
effects: Once I assign a pre migration check tool B to a promotion channel A for pre migration check, it is the case that B is assigned to the promotion channel A for pre migration check
Once I assign a pre migration check tool B to a promotion channel A for pre migration check, it is not the case anymore that the precheck tool B is available

release_precheck_tool_from_channel.description: release a pre migration check tool B from a promotion channel A for pre migration check
preconditions: I can only release a pre migration check tool B from a promotion channel A for pre migration check if it is the case that B is assigned to the promotion channel A for pre migration check
effects: Once I release a pre migration check tool B from a promotion channel A for pre migration check, it is the case that the precheck tool B is available
Once I release a pre migration check tool B from a promotion channel A for pre migration check, it is not the case anymore that B is assigned to the promotion channel A for pre migration check

assign_dependent_service_to_channel.description: assign a dependent service B to a promotion channel A as a dependent service
preconditions: I can only assign a dependent service B to a promotion channel A as a dependent service if it is the case that A is a registered channel and the dependent service B is available and the promotion channel A supports the dependent service B
effects: Once I assign a dependent service B to a promotion channel A as a dependent service, it is the case that B is assigned to the promotion channel A as a dependent service
Once I assign a dependent service B to a promotion channel A as a dependent service, it is not the case anymore that the dependent service B is available

release_dependent_service_from_channel.description: release a dependent service B from a promotion channel A as a dependent service
preconditions: I can only release a dependent service B from a promotion channel A as a dependent service if it is the case that B is assigned to the promotion channel A as a dependent service
effects: Once I release a dependent service B from a promotion channel A as a dependent service, it is the case that the dependent service B is available
Once I release a dependent service B from a promotion channel A as a dependent service, it is not the case anymore that B is assigned to the promotion channel A as a dependent service

assign_postcheck_tool_to_channel.description: assign a post migration check tool B to a promotion channel A as a post migration check tool
preconditions: I can only assign a post migration check tool B to a promotion channel A as a post migration check tool if it is the case that A is a registered channel and the post migration check tool B is available and the promotion channel A supports the post migration check tool B
effects: Once I assign a post migration check tool B to a promotion channel A as a post migration check tool, it is the case that B is assigned to the promotion channel A as a post migration check tool
Once I assign a post migration check tool B to a promotion channel A as a post migration check tool, it is not the case anymore that the post migration check tool B is available

release_postcheck_tool_from_channel.description: release a post migration check tool B from a promotion channel A as a post migration check tool
preconditions: I can only release a post migration check tool B from a promotion channel A as a post migration check tool if it is the case that B is assigned to the promotion channel A as a post migration check tool
effects: Once I release a post migration check tool B from a promotion channel A as a post migration check tool, it is the case that the post migration check tool B is available

Once I release a post migration check tool B from a promotion channel A as a post migration check tool, it is not the case anymore that B is assigned to the promotion channel A as a post migration check tool

assign_database_cluster_to_channel.description: assign a database cluster B to a promotion channel A
preconditions: I can only assign a database cluster B to a promotion channel A if it is the case that A is a registered channel and the database cluster B is available and the promotion channel A supports the database cluster B
effects: Once I assign a database cluster B to a promotion channel A, it is the case that B is assigned to the promotion channel A as a database cluster
Once I assign a database cluster B to a promotion channel A, it is not the case anymore that the database cluster B is available

release_database_cluster_from_channel.description: release a database cluster B from a promotion channel A
preconditions: I can only release a database cluster B from a promotion channel A if it is the case that B is assigned to the promotion channel A as a database cluster
effects: Once I release a database cluster B from a promotion channel A, it is the case that the database cluster B is available
Once I release a database cluster B from a promotion channel A, it is not the case anymore that B is assigned to the promotion channel A as a database cluster

execute_environment_deployment.description: execute deployment in a deployment environment B using a promotion channel A with a pre migration check tool C and a dependent service D
preconditions: I can only execute deployment in a deployment environment B using a promotion channel A with a pre migration check tool C and a dependent service D if it is the case that A has allocations and C is assigned to the promotion channel A for pre migration check and D is assigned to the promotion channel A as a dependent service and B is available and the promotion channel A can target the deployment environment B

I can only execute deployment in a deployment environment B using a promotion channel A with a pre migration check tool C and a dependent service D if it is not the case that A has a committed deployment
effects: Once I execute deployment in a deployment environment B using a promotion channel A with a pre migration check tool C and a dependent service D, it is the case that A has a deployment record in the environment B and A has a committed deployment
Once I execute deployment in a deployment environment B using a promotion channel A with a pre migration check tool C and a dependent service D, it is not the case anymore that B is available

execute_environment_deployment_with_back.description: execute deployment with backup in a deployment environment B using a promotion channel A with a post migration check tool C and a backup snapshot D
preconditions: I can only execute deployment with backup in a deployment environment B using a promotion channel A with a post migration check tool C and a backup snapshot D if it is the case that A has allocations and C is assigned to the promotion channel A as a post migration check tool and the backup snapshot D is available and B is available and the promotion channel A can target the deployment environment B and the promotion channel A supports the backup snapshot D

I can only execute deployment with backup in a deployment environment B using a promotion channel A with a post migration check tool C and a backup snapshot D if it is not the case that A has a committed deployment
effects: Once I execute deployment with backup in a deployment environment B using a promotion channel A with a post migration check tool C and a backup snapshot D, it is the case that A has a deployment record in the environment B and A has a committed deployment and A has pending environment checks and A is pending verification

Once I execute deployment with backup in a deployment environment B using a promotion channel A with a post migration check tool C and a backup snapshot D, it is not the case anymore that B is available and it is not the case anymore that the backup snapshot D is available

finalize_environment_checks.description: finalize environment checks for a promotion channel A using a pre migration check tool B with a dependent service C
preconditions: I can only finalize environment checks for a promotion channel A using a pre migration check tool B with a dependent service C if it is the case that A has a committed deployment and A has pending environment checks and B is assigned to the promotion channel A for pre migration check and C is assigned to the promotion channel A as a dependent service
effects: Once I finalize environment checks for a promotion channel A using a pre migration check tool B with a dependent service C, it is not the case anymore that A has pending environment checks and it is not the case anymore that A is pending verification

approve_rollback_plan.description: approve rollback plan for a promotion channel A using a pre migration check tool B with a dependent service C in a canary group D
preconditions: I can only approve rollback plan for a promotion channel A using a pre migration check tool B with a dependent service C in a canary group D if it is the case that A is staged for migration and A has a committed deployment and B is assigned to the promotion channel A for pre migration check and C is assigned to the promotion channel A as a dependent service and channel member of group A D

I can only approve rollback plan for a promotion channel A using a pre migration check tool B with a dependent service C in a canary group D if it is not the case that A is pending verification and it is not the case that A is ready for rollback
effects: Once I approve rollback plan for a promotion channel A using a pre migration check tool B with a dependent service C in a canary group D, it is the case that A is ready for rollback

approve_rollback_with_compliance_profile.description: approve rollback with compliance profile for a promotion channel A using a post migration check tool B with a database cluster C under a compliance profile D
preconditions: I can only approve rollback with compliance profile for a promotion channel A using a post migration check tool B with a database cluster C under a compliance profile D if it is the case that A is staged for migration and A has a committed deployment and B is assigned to the promotion channel A as a post migration check tool and C is assigned to the promotion channel A as a database cluster and channel member of group A D

I can only approve rollback with compliance profile for a promotion channel A using a post migration check tool B with a database cluster C under a compliance profile D if it is not the case that A is ready for rollback
effects: Once I approve rollback with compliance profile for a promotion channel A using a post migration check tool B with a database cluster C under a compliance profile D, it is the case that A is ready for rollback and A is pending verification

approve_finalization.description: approve finalization for a promotion channel A using a pre migration check tool B with a dependent service C
preconditions: I can only approve finalization for a promotion channel A using a pre migration check tool B with a dependent service C if it is the case that A is ready for rollback and A is pending verification and B is assigned to the promotion channel A for pre migration check and C is assigned to the promotion channel A as a dependent service
effects: Once I approve finalization for a promotion channel A using a pre migration check tool B with a dependent service C, it is the case that A has been approved for finalization

Once I approve finalization for a promotion channel A using a pre migration check tool B with a dependent service C, it is not the case anymore that A is pending verification and it is not the case anymore that A is staged for migration and it is not the case anymore that A has pending environment checks

apply_operator_credentials_for_preparati.description: apply an operator credential C to a promotion channel A with a promotion configuration B for preparation
preconditions: I can only apply an operator credential C to a promotion channel A with a promotion configuration B for preparation if it is the case that A has been approved for finalization and A is ready for rollback and A has allocations and A has the configuration B and the operator credential C is available
I can only apply an operator credential C to a promotion channel A with a promotion configuration B for preparation if it is not the case that A is staged for migration
effects: Once I apply an operator credential C to a promotion channel A with a promotion configuration B for preparation, it is the case that A is staged for migration

prepare_channel_version_staging.description: prepare a promotion channel A with a promotion configuration B for version staging
preconditions: I can only prepare a promotion channel A with a promotion configuration B for version staging if it is the case that A is ready for rollback and A is staged for migration and A has the configuration B
I can only prepare a promotion channel A with a promotion configuration B for version staging if it is not the case that A is pending verification and it is not the case that A has a version staged
effects: Once I prepare a promotion channel A with a promotion configuration B for version staging, it is the case that A has a version staged

prepare_channel_version_staging_with_age.description: prepare a promotion channel A for version staging using a verification agent B
preconditions: I can only prepare a promotion channel A for version staging using a verification agent B if it is the case that A is ready for rollback and A is staged for migration and the verification agent B is available
I can only prepare a promotion channel A for version staging using a verification agent B if it is not the case that A is pending verification and it is not the case that A has a version staged
effects: Once I prepare a promotion channel A for version staging using a verification agent B, it is the case that A has a version staged
Once I prepare a promotion channel A for version staging using a verification agent B, it is not the case anymore that the verification agent B is available

assign_version_to_endpoint.description: assign a schema version B to a promotion channel A
preconditions: I can only assign a schema version B to a promotion channel A if it is the case that A has a version staged and the schema version B is available and A is linked to schema version B
effects: Once I assign a schema version B to a promotion channel A, it is the case that A is assigned the version B
Once I assign a schema version B to a promotion channel A, it is not the case anymore that the schema version B is available

stage_schema_version_for_channel.description: stage a schema version C for a channel endpoint secondary A using a channel endpoint primary B
preconditions: I can only stage a schema version C for a channel endpoint secondary A using a channel endpoint primary B if it is the case that A is a registered channel and A is the secondary endpoint and A is allowed for schema version C and B is assigned the version C
I can only stage a schema version C for a channel endpoint secondary A using a channel endpoint primary B if it is not the case that A is staged for schema version C
effects: Once I stage a schema version C for a channel endpoint secondary A using a channel endpoint primary B, it is the case that A is staged for schema version C

schedule_channel_monitoring.description: schedule monitoring for a promotion channel A with a promotion configuration B using an operator credential C
preconditions: I can only schedule monitoring for a promotion channel A with a promotion configuration B using an operator credential C if it is the case that A is a registered channel and A is the secondary endpoint and A is staged for migration and A has a version staged and A has the configuration B and the operator credential C is available
I can only schedule monitoring for a promotion channel A with a promotion configuration B using an operator credential C if it is not the case that A is scheduled for monitoring
effects: Once I schedule monitoring for a promotion channel A with a promotion configuration B using an operator credential C, it is the case that A is scheduled for monitoring

finalize_channel_with_primary_endpoint.description: finalize a promotion channel A with primary endpoint
preconditions: I can only finalize a promotion channel A with primary endpoint if it is the case that A is the primary endpoint and A is a registered channel and A has allocations and A has a committed deployment and A is ready for rollback and A has a version staged and A is staged for migration
I can only finalize a promotion channel A with primary endpoint if it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I finalize a promotion channel A with primary endpoint, it is the case that A is finalized

finalize_channel_with_version.description: finalize a promotion channel A with a schema version B
preconditions: I can only finalize a promotion channel A with a schema version B if it is the case that A is the secondary endpoint and A is a registered channel and A has allocations and A has a committed deployment and A is ready for rollback and A has a version staged and A is staged for migration and A is staged for schema version B
I can only finalize a promotion channel A with a schema version B if it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I finalize a promotion channel A with a schema version B, it is the case that A is finalized

finalize_channel_with_monitoring.description: finalize a promotion channel A with monitoring
preconditions: I can only finalize a promotion channel A with monitoring if it is the case that A is the secondary endpoint and A is a registered channel and A has allocations and A has a committed deployment and A is ready for rollback and A has a version staged and A is staged for migration and A is scheduled for monitoring
I can only finalize a promotion channel A with monitoring if it is not the case that A is finalized
effects: Once I finalize a promotion channel A with monitoring, it is the case that A is finalized

action_nl_templates.register_channel: register promotion channel {?promotion_channel} as a registered channel
action_nl_templates.assign_service_to_channel: assign promotion channel {?promotion_channel} to service instance {?service_instance}
action_nl_templates.unassign_service_from_channel: unassign promotion channel {?promotion_channel} from service instance {?service_instance}
action_nl_templates.bind_promotion_config: bind promotion configuration {?promotion_configuration} to promotion channel {?promotion_channel}
action_nl_templates.unbind_promotion_config: unbind promotion configuration {?promotion_configuration} from promotion channel {?promotion_channel}
action_nl_templates.activate_promotion_configuration: activate promotion configuration {?promotion_configuration} on promotion channel {?promotion_channel}
action_nl_templates.attach_verification_agent: attach verification agent {?verification_agent} to promotion channel {?promotion_channel}
action_nl_templates.operator_stage_migration: stage migration for promotion channel {?promotion_channel} using promotion configuration {?promotion_configuration} with operator credential {?operator_credential}
action_nl_templates.stage_migration_for_version: stage migration for promotion channel {?promotion_channel} with schema version {?schema_version}
action_nl_templates.assign_precheck_tool_to_channel: assign pre migration check tool {?pre_migration_check_tool} to promotion channel {?promotion_channel} for pre-migration check
action_nl_templates.release_precheck_tool_from_channel: release pre migration check tool {?pre_migration_check_tool} from promotion channel {?promotion_channel} for pre-migration check
action_nl_templates.assign_dependent_service_to_channel: assign dependent service {?dependent_service} to promotion channel {?promotion_channel} as a dependent service

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a promotion channel or a service instance or a deployment environment or a dependent service or a pre migration check tool or a post migration check tool or a promotion configuration or a verification agent or a schema version or a operator credential or a backup snapshot or a database cluster or a channel group is also a object
Everything that is a canary group or a compliance profile is also a channel group
Everything that is a channel endpoint primary or a channel endpoint secondary is also a promotion channel
